projects.title: Kitchen Chaos
projects.description: A fast-paced, Unity-based cooking simulation game featuring sprite, animation, and sound asset integration.

projects.title: Dodge the Ball
projects.description: Survive waves of enemy balls chasing you on a platform. Features AI behavior and physics-based interactions.

projects.title: Lunar Lander
projects.description: 2D space game where players control a lander navigating multiple levels while managing fuel.

projects.title: Spotify-Clone
projects.description: Responsive music player built with HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. Features playlists and audio controls.

projects.title: Password-Manager
projects.description: Secure and responsive password manager application built with React and Vite.

projects.title: TodoList
projects.description: Minimal React/Vite/TypeScript task manager with Hot Module Replacement and ESLint integration.

projects.title: AR 3D Model Generation
projects.description: AR pipeline for generating and loading 3D models from captured images dynamically within Unity.

projects.title: Urdu Hate Speech Detection
projects.description: Benchmarking traditional and neural models on NUHONS dataset for Nastaliq Urdu hate-speech detection.

projects.title: Urdu Fake News Detection
projects.description: N-Gram language modeling and custom Naive Bayes classifier from scratch to identify Urdu fake news.

projects.title: Eliza Chatbot
projects.description: Rule-based conversational agent mimicking ELIZA, tailored as a mental health support therapist.

projects.title: Urdu Tokenization
projects.description: Custom tokenization and sentence segmentation for informal, Nastaliq Urdu text tackling script issues.

projects.title: PVFC Order Management
projects.description: E-commerce order management system with Customer Segmentation and Business Intelligence.

projects.title: Quiz Management System
projects.description: Web-based quiz system with role-based access for teachers and students, supporting timed assessments.
